summary: Completed testing of Read Receipts and Extended Permission Enforcement features. Backend: 12/14 tests passed (2 skipped due to DMCreate model requiring content field). Frontend: Read receipt UI working - shows 'Sent' with CheckCheck icon for sent messages, data-testid='read-receipt-*' present.

minor.issue: DMCreate model requires 'content' field but endpoint doesn't use it - causes confusion in API usage

passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/channels/{id}/read with last_message_id returns 200
Backend: POST /api/channels/{id}/read without last_message_id returns 400
Backend: GET /api/channels/{id}/read-receipts returns array of receipts
Backend: POST /api/dm/{id}/read with last_message_id returns 200 (manual curl test)
Backend: GET /api/dm/{id}/read-receipts returns array (manual curl test)
Backend: PUT /api/servers/{id} requires MANAGE_SERVER permission (non-owner gets 403)
Backend: Owner can update server (bypasses permission check)
Backend: POST /api/servers/{id}/invites requires CREATE_INVITE permission (403 when removed)
Backend: Owner can create invites (bypasses permission check)
Backend: POST /api/channel-messages/{id}/reactions requires ADD_REACTIONS permission (403 when removed)
Backend: Owner can add reactions (bypasses permission check)
Backend: POST /api/channel-messages/{id}/thread requires SEND_MESSAGES_IN_THREADS permission (403 when removed)
Backend: Owner can reply in threads (bypasses permission check)
Backend: Owner has full permissions for all operations
Frontend: Login successful
Frontend: Server navigation working
Frontend: Channel selection working
Frontend: Message sending working
Frontend: Read receipt indicator shows 'Sent' with CheckCheck icon for sent messages
Frontend: data-testid='read-receipt-*' attribute present on read receipt elements
critical_code_review_comments: DMCreate model in models.py requires 'content' field but /api/dm/create endpoint doesn't use it - consider making content optional or removing from model
seed_data_creation: Created test servers and users during testing (prefixed with TEST_)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Read Receipts feature is fully functional. Backend endpoints: POST /api/channels/{id}/read, GET /api/channels/{id}/read-receipts, POST /api/dm/{id}/read, GET /api/dm/{id}/read-receipts all work correctly. Frontend ChatArea.js shows CheckCheck icon with 'Sent' (grey) for sent messages and 'Seen by [names]' (green) when others read. Permission enforcement working: MANAGE_SERVER on PUT /servers/{id}, CREATE_INVITE on POST /servers/{id}/invites, ADD_REACTIONS on POST /channel-messages/{id}/reactions, SEND_MESSAGES_IN_THREADS on POST /channel-messages/{id}/thread. Owner always bypasses permission checks via compute_member_permissions() returning Permissions.ALL.

permission_enforcement.2_owner_update_server: PASS - Owner can always update server
permission_enforcement.4_owner_create_invite: PASS - Owner can always create invites
permission_enforcement.6_owner_add_reaction: PASS - Owner can always add reactions
permission_enforcement.8_owner_thread_reply: PASS - Owner can always reply in threads
